name: gws
description: Pinned Google Workspace CLI wrapper backed by the link-gws-cli fork snapshot and strict binary checksum verification.
capability_summary: Primary Workspace CLI for LiNKskills. Provides dynamic method discovery within exposed top-level services and deterministic JSON output.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Top-level gws service alias (for example: drive, gmail, calendar, docs, sheets, chat).

parameters.name: resource_method
parameters.description: Discovery-based resource and method path for the selected service.

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional CLI flags/values passed through to gws commands.

flags.name: --help
flags.description: Show command help and available usage patterns.

flags.name: --version
flags.description: Show gws version and support disclaimer.

flags.name: --format
flags.description: Output format (json default; table/yaml/csv available per gws).
